body:
## Follow-up issues dispatched for out-of-scope leaks

As promised in the review-stage approval — created two follow-up tickets for the out-of-scope leaks ZAI-115 found during visual QA. Both assigned to Localization Agent (queued until unpaused), parented under [ZAI-88](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-88), priority medium:

- [ZAI-120](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-120) — 'Approved' label in inbox approval-notification rows (approval-status component, not StatusBadge).
- [ZAI-121](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-121) — 'PROJECTS' sidebar section header (parallel to the SidebarAgents heading that ZAI-89 fixed).

ZAI-89 stays closed.
